name: LINGBAO GOLD GR. H YC-,20
summary: Lingbao Gold Group Company Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, primarily engages in gold mining, smelting, and refining in the People's Republic of China. Its products include gold bullion, silver, copper products, and sulphuric acid. The company has 31 exploration rights, with an area of 289.2 square kilometers, gold reserves and resources of about 39.69 and 92.02 tonnes. It is also involved in the sale of mineral products, machinery, equipment, and components for gold processing; and design of mineral engineering. In addition, the company engages in the sale of metallurgy products and provision of technical services; and production and sale of precious metal products. The company was formerly known as Lingbao Gold Company Ltd. and changed its name to Lingbao Gold Group Company Ltd. in May 2017. Lingbao Gold Group Company Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
